raw_consumer_statement:
CFPB ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) To : Consumer Financial Protection Bureau Subject : Complaint Against Barclays Bank Delaware Mishandling of Billing Dispute XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX, {$1500.00} ) Dear CFPB, I am requesting your intervention regarding Barclays Bank Delawares improper handling of my billing dispute under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ). 
Background On XX/XX/year>, XXXX XXXX  XXXX charged my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$1500.00}. 
I disputed this charge with Barclays, as the services contracted were never delivered. 
On XX/XX/year>, Barclays sent me a letter ( attached ) denying the dispute, claiming they could not obtain credit on my behalf because they can only intervene after the specified delivery date has passed. 

Problem Barclays stated reason for denial was procedural they claimed intervention could not occur until after the contract date. 
That date has now passed, yet Barclays has refused to reopen or resolve the dispute. 
This leaves me liable for a charge where services were not rendered, in direct conflict with the protections of the FCBA. 
Violations Failure to investigate reasonably : Barclays dismissed my dispute on a technicality and refused to revisit it once the contractual delivery period expired. 
Failure to credit for undelivered services : Under the FCBA, consumers are not liable for charges where goods or services were not delivered as agreed. 
Unfair treatment : Barclays refusal to reopen the case contradicts its own written explanation ( that they could intervene after the contract date ). 
Relief Requested I respectfully request that the CFPB : XXXX. XXXX. XXXX. Require Barclays to reopen and properly investigate this dispute in compliance with the Fair Credit Billing Act. 
Compel Barclays to reverse the {$1500.00} charge plus any interest and fees applied. 
Review Barclays dispute-handling procedures for compliance, as this denial demonstrates a failure to uphold consumer protections. 
I have already attempted resolution directly with Barclays, but their refusal to cure the issue has forced me to escalate this matter. 
Thank you for your assistance. 
Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
